svc_detailed_engineering.title: Detailed Engineering Services
svc_detailed_engineering.summary: Multidisciplinary engineering delivered by 275+ professionals using advanced CAD/CAE tools.
svc_detailed_engineering.description:
Our engineering offices, staffed by over 275 qualified professionals, provide a wide range of detailed engineering services across every discipline a modern project demands.
We utilise advanced CAD/CAE design software and maintain in-house capabilities for specialised requirements — covering Buildings, Civil and Structural Works, Water Reservoirs and Networks, Sewage Treatment, Dams and Irrigation, Marine Works, Power Generation, and Transportation Engineering.
svc_detailed_engineering.capabilities: Buildings, civil & structural design, Water reservoirs and networks, Sewage treatment engineering, Dams, irrigation & marine works, Power generation systems, Transportation engineering

svc_procurement_expediting.title: Procurement & Expediting Services
svc_procurement_expediting.summary: ISO 9001 procurement ensuring the right materials arrive on time, at the highest quality.
svc_procurement_expediting.description:
Our central procurement department, operating under an ISO 9001-approved manual, ensures the timely acquisition of materials, equipment, and services at the highest quality standards.
Our scope includes purchasing and sourcing, shop expediting, quality surveillance, and logistics expertise. We also utilise E-Procurement solutions — including a unified materials catalogue and supply agreements — to enhance efficiency.
svc_procurement_expediting.capabilities: Purchasing & strategic sourcing, Shop expediting, Quality surveillance, Logistics & freight management, E-procurement & materials catalogue, Supply agreements

svc_construction_services.title: Construction Services
svc_construction_services.summary: Comprehensive construction capability across building, civil, and MEP works at any scale.
svc_construction_services.description:
With teams of experienced construction specialists, INFRA Construction provides comprehensive construction capabilities across multiple fields.
We have a proven track record of managing diverse workforces and efficiently mobilising equipment and crews for projects of any scale. Our services include building works, civil engineering, and the erection of mechanical, electrical, and piping systems.
svc_construction_services.capabilities: Building works, Civil engineering, Mechanical erection, Electrical installation, Piping systems, Rapid crew & equipment mobilisation

svc_construction_management.title: Construction Management Services
svc_construction_management.summary: Sophisticated controls that keep large, complex projects safe, on time, and effective.
svc_construction_management.description:
INFRA Construction excels in managing large, complex projects, employing sophisticated management controls for planning and monitoring to ensure safe, timely, and effective construction.
We leverage our global experience and deep understanding of local laws to facilitate rapid mobilisation and successful project execution wherever we operate.
svc_construction_management.capabilities: Planning & scheduling controls, Progress monitoring, Safety management, Local regulatory compliance, Rapid mobilisation, Multi-site coordination

svc_facilities_management.title: Facilities Management Services
svc_facilities_management.summary: A one-stop-shop for management, maintenance, procurement, design, and health & safety.
svc_facilities_management.description:
As a comprehensive “one-stop-shop”, INFRA Construction offers top-tier facility and property management services. Our team provides complete solutions for management, maintenance, procurement, design, and health and safety.
We tailor our services on a client-by-client basis, providing both on-site teams and off-site support such as help desks.
svc_facilities_management.capabilities: Property & facility management, Planned maintenance, Procurement support, Design services, Health & safety, On-site teams & help desks

svc_operation_maintenance.title: Operation & Maintenance Services
svc_operation_maintenance.summary: Comprehensive O&M that optimises the performance and longevity of your assets.
svc_operation_maintenance.description:
We specialise in providing comprehensive O&M services to optimise the operational performance and longevity of our clients' assets.
Our services include routine inspections, preventive and corrective maintenance, breakdown and emergency repairs, and manpower support tailored to each facility.
svc_operation_maintenance.capabilities: Routine inspections, Preventive maintenance, Corrective maintenance, Breakdown & emergency repairs, Manpower support, Performance optimisation

svc_project_management_consultancy.title: Project Management Consultancy
svc_project_management_consultancy.summary: Expert PMC balancing scope, time, cost, and quality from planning through handover.
svc_project_management_consultancy.description:
We offer expert project management consultancy to ensure your projects meet the best goals of scope, time, cost, and quality.
Our services cover project planning, risk assessment, claims management, contract administration, and value engineering — a full advisory layer around your programme.
svc_project_management_consultancy.capabilities: Project planning, Risk assessment, Claims management, Contract administration, Value engineering, Scope, time, cost & quality control

svc_construction_supervision.title: Construction Supervision
svc_construction_supervision.summary: Rigorous on-site supervision ensuring work meets specifications and international codes.
svc_construction_supervision.description:
Our experienced professionals provide rigorous construction supervision to ensure that all work is executed according to specifications, international codes, and quality standards.
We oversee every aspect of the construction process to guarantee compliance and quality at each stage of delivery.
svc_construction_supervision.capabilities: Specification compliance, International code adherence, Quality assurance, Workmanship inspection, Site coordination, Progress verification

svc_quantity_surveying.title: Quantity Surveying
svc_quantity_surveying.summary: Precise cost estimates, bills of quantities, and cost control across the lifecycle.
svc_quantity_surveying.description:
We provide accurate and detailed quantity surveying services to help manage project costs effectively.
Our team delivers precise cost estimates, bills of quantities, and cost control throughout the project lifecycle, giving clients confidence in every figure.
svc_quantity_surveying.capabilities: Cost estimation, Bills of quantities, Cost control & reporting, Valuations & payments, Tender pricing, Final account settlement

svc_risk_assessment_management.title: Risk Assessment & Management
svc_risk_assessment_management.summary: Identifying project challenges early and building strategies that keep delivery stable.
svc_risk_assessment_management.description:
INFRA Construction conducts thorough risk assessments to identify potential project challenges before they threaten delivery.
We develop and implement comprehensive risk management strategies to mitigate these risks, ensuring project stability and success.
svc_risk_assessment_management.capabilities: Risk identification, Impact & probability analysis, Mitigation strategies, Risk registers, Contingency planning, Ongoing monitoring

svc_value_engineering.title: Value Engineering
svc_value_engineering.summary: Optimising designs and processes for the highest value without compromising quality.
svc_value_engineering.description:
We apply value engineering principles to optimise project designs and processes.
Our goal is to achieve the highest value for our clients by analysing functions and identifying cost-effective alternatives without compromising quality or performance.
svc_value_engineering.capabilities: Function analysis, Design optimisation, Cost-effective alternatives, Lifecycle cost review, Constructability studies, Performance benchmarking

svc_claims_management.title: Claims Management
svc_claims_management.summary: Preparing and defending claims efficiently to protect our clients' interests.
svc_claims_management.description:
Our team has the expertise to navigate complex contractual issues.
We provide professional claims management services — preparing and defending claims efficiently and effectively to protect our clients' interests throughout a contract's life.
svc_claims_management.capabilities: Claim preparation, Claim defence, Contractual analysis, Delay & disruption analysis, Negotiation support, Dispute avoidance

svc_contract_administration.title: Contract Administration
svc_contract_administration.summary: Managing every contractual obligation so projects run exactly to their terms.
svc_contract_administration.description:
We offer comprehensive contract administration services to manage all aspects of contractual agreements.
This ensures that all parties meet their obligations, and the project is executed according to the contract's terms and conditions.
svc_contract_administration.capabilities: Contract drafting review, Obligation tracking, Variation management, Payment certification, Correspondence control, Close-out administration

svc_building_information_modelling.title: Building Information Modelling (BIM)
svc_building_information_modelling.summary: Intelligent 3D digital models that improve delivery across the facility lifecycle.
svc_building_information_modelling.description:
Our BIM centres are staffed with engineers and IT professionals who support projects of varying size and complexity.
We use intelligent 3D digital representations to improve project delivery, facilitate decision-making, and manage information throughout the entire facility lifecycle.
svc_building_information_modelling.capabilities: 3D coordinated modelling, Clash detection, 4D scheduling & 5D cost, Information management, Design collaboration, Lifecycle asset data

sct_buildings.title: Built Environment
sct_buildings.summary: Distinguished public and private buildings — architecture, MEP, and civil works.
sct_buildings.description:
We construct distinguished and exceptional public and private buildings.
Our portfolio showcases a range of outstanding projects, reflecting our commitment to excellence and innovation in architecture, MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing), and civil works.
sct_buildings.capabilities: Residential & commercial buildings, Institutional & public facilities, Architectural design, MEP engineering, Structural & civil works, Fit-out & finishing

sct_networks_infrastructures.title: Water & Wastewater Management
sct_networks_infrastructures.summary: Vital utility networks for water, wastewater, and critical distribution systems.
sct_networks_infrastructures.description:
INFRA Construction has extensive experience in developing vital infrastructure networks.
This includes projects for water and wastewater collection and distribution, as well as other critical utility networks that connect communities and industry.
sct_networks_infrastructures.capabilities: Water distribution networks, Wastewater collection, Utility networks, Pumping stations, Network rehabilitation, Urban infrastructure

sct_civil_works.title: Dams and Irrigations
sct_civil_works.summary: Reservoirs, storage tanks, dams, and irrigation — sustainable water resource works.
sct_civil_works.description:
Our expertise in civil works covers a broad scope of projects including water reservoirs, storage tanks, dams, and irrigation systems.
We provide robust and sustainable solutions for essential water resource management, engineered to endure in demanding environments.
sct_civil_works.capabilities: Water reservoirs, Storage tanks, Dams & dikes, Irrigation systems, Earthworks, Reinforced concrete structures

sct_transportation_roads_bridges.title: Ports & Marine
sct_transportation_roads_bridges.summary: Complex transport projects that enhance communities and quality of life.
sct_transportation_roads_bridges.description:
We specialise in the successful delivery of large, complex transport projects.
Our services cover all aspects of road, highway, and bridge engineering — from planning and design to construction and maintenance. We aim to enhance communities and improve quality of life through sustainable transportation solutions.
sct_transportation_roads_bridges.capabilities: Highways & expressways, Urban & rural roads, Bridges & flyovers, Causeways, Road maintenance, Traffic & drainage works

sct_water_sewage_treatment.title: Airports
sct_water_sewage_treatment.summary: Complete water and sewage solutions — treatment plants to distribution networks.
sct_water_sewage_treatment.description:
INFRA Construction provides complete solutions for water and sewage treatment.
Our services range from the construction of treatment plants to the installation of vast collection and distribution networks. We are dedicated to maximising efficiencies and delivering sustainable solutions in this critical sector.
sct_water_sewage_treatment.capabilities: Water treatment plants, Sewage treatment plants, Collection networks, Distribution networks, Pumping & lift stations, Process & mechanical works

sct_dams_irrigation.title: Roads & Bridges
sct_dams_irrigation.summary: Planning, design, and construction of dams and irrigation for water and agriculture.
sct_dams_irrigation.description:
We have the technical expertise for the planning, design, and construction of dams and irrigation systems.
These crucial structures manage flood control, provide water storage, and support agriculture — especially in arid regions where water security is vital.
sct_dams_irrigation.capabilities: Dam construction, Flood-control structures, Water storage, Irrigation canals, Dikes & barrages, Agricultural water supply

sct_pipelines.title: Energy
sct_pipelines.summary: Complex pipeline systems for refinery, petrochemical, cross-state, and utility use.
sct_pipelines.description:
Our capabilities include the construction and installation of complex pipeline systems for various applications.
We provide engineering services for refinery piping, petrochemical piping, cross-state pipelines, and utility piping — complete with 3D modelling and stress analysis.
sct_pipelines.capabilities: Refinery piping, Petrochemical piping, Cross-state pipelines, Utility piping, 3D modelling, Pipe stress analysis

svc_hub.title: Our Services
svc_hub.subtitle: A full spectrum of services covering the entire project lifecycle — from initial design and procurement through construction, maintenance, and facility management.
svc_hub.intro: INFRA Construction is a comprehensive contracting and project-management firm offering integrated solutions that ensure project success. Our commitment to international standards, quality, and safety drives every one of the 14 services we deliver.
svc_hub.ctaBody: Partner with INFRA Construction for engineering precision and dependable delivery.

sct_hub.title: Our Sectors
sct_hub.subtitle: A rich history of executing projects across a diverse range of sectors — demonstrating our versatility and technical depth across two continents.
sct_hub.intro: INFRA Construction has a strong presence in the Middle East, East Africa, and East Asia. We apply our comprehensive services across seven core sectors of activity, delivering robust and sustainable outcomes in each.
sct_hub.ctaBody: Partner with INFRA Construction for engineering precision and dependable delivery.

about_mvp.title: Mission, Vision & Philosophy
about_mvp.missionText: In order to meet our clients' high expectations, our diverse and highly qualified staff apply their teamwork skills optimizing end results with high international standards. We are devoted to understanding every client's needs and continually developing the techniques and procedures of construction.
about_mvp.visionText: With a focus on outstanding time, cost, and resources management, our company strives to assume a significant role in the construction of Mega projects across various domains. By adhering to the best practices in project and construction management, we consistently deliver exceptional results.
about_mvp.philosophyText: Infra Construction works to introduce excellent ways of management for a wide range of project types. All projects are managed to achieve the best goals of Scope, Time, Cost & Quality — on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards.

about_story_full.title: A Legacy of Building the World
about_story_full.p1: Actualizing design and shop drawings is our main critical mission — implemented based on past experiences and the vast knowledge of our engineers. Infra Construction is a contracting company that has carried out numerous and various projects since its establishment in 1990.
about_story_full.p2: Every task Infra Construction took up was executed through hard work and dedication from our team professionals. Possessing all the needed resources is a crucial factor in achieving any project successfully — however, the factor that delivers outstanding results is managing these resources optimally.
about_story_full.p3: Infra Construction represents the working arm providing professional services in the contracting niche — especially in the infrastructure field — executing according to international codes and project specifications across the UAE, Egypt, Yemen, and Canada.

about_ceo_bio.bio1: As Founder and Chief Executive Officer of INFRA Construction, Mr. Hany El-Sahooly has led the company since its establishment in 1990 — shaping it into a trusted name in buildings, infrastructure, and industrial construction across the Middle East, Africa, and North America.
about_ceo_bio.bio2: His vision drives every project we deliver — built on integrity, engineering excellence, and a commitment to exceeding client expectations at every step.

about_future_goals.title: Future Goals & Partnerships
about_future_goals.p1: INFRA Construction aims to build mutual interest with clients, developers, and project management units across the globe.
about_future_goals.goal_2: Government authorities — ministries and local councils
about_future_goals.goal_3: International funding agencies (World Bank, Arab Fund, Kuwait Fund)
about_future_goals.goal_4: Long-term joint ventures with regional and international partners

about_team_roles.title: Dedicated Professionals
about_team_roles.p1: Infra Construction believes that human resources ae the most valuable stimulus for economic development. Our hiring policy embraces employees who combine both creativity and technical mastery of their tools.

about_org_full.title: Organizational Structure
about_org_full.p1: Adaptable and expandable, our structure maintains horizontal relationships across all departments while growing to meet market demand.

about_intro.title: Two Decades of Infrastructure Excellence
about_intro.p1: INFRA Construction was established in 1990 with a clear mission: to deliver complex infrastructure and construction projects to international standards in markets where excellence is most needed. From a specialist contractor serving the Middle East, INFRA has grown into a multi-sector, multi-regional construction group operating across the UAE, Egypt, Yemen, Jordan, Canada, and East Africa.
about_intro.p2: Today, INFRA Construction operates as a member of HS Group — delivering projects across Buildings & Architecture, Infrastructure & Civil Works, Water & Utilities, Energy & Power, Industrial & Oil Services, Engineering & EPC, and Facilities Management. Our integrated capabilities allow us to serve as a single trusted partner from project inception through long-term operations.
about_intro.p3: Backed by ISO 9001 and ISO 14001, certifications, our commitment to quality, safety, and environmental responsibility is embedded in every project we undertake.

about_quote.text: Engineering integrity, safety, and on-time delivery are non-negotiable. We invest in people, plant, and partnerships that compound over years.
about_quote.author: INFRA Construction — Operating Philosophy

about_foundation.title: Built on Engineering Discipline
about_foundation.p1: INFRA Construction was established in 1990 as a specialist contracting company, with the goal of delivering complex infrastructure work to international standards. The company's foundation rests on engineering discipline, operational integrity, and a commitment to delivering every project safely, on time, and to specification.
about_foundation.p2: Over more than two decades, INFRA has expanded its capabilities, its geographic reach, and its sector coverage — evolving from a regional contractor into a multi-disciplinary construction group with a presence across the Middle East, Africa, and Canada.
about_foundation.p3: INFRA is a member of HS Group, which provides the group-level strategic direction, financial backing, and executive leadership that enables INFRA to compete for and deliver major programmes across international markets.

about_future.title: Our Vision for the Future
about_future.p1: INFRA Construction continues to expand its geographic reach, deepen its sector capabilities, and strengthen its partnerships across the Middle East, Africa, and beyond. Our strategic priorities include growing our presence in East Africa, expanding our engineering and EPC capabilities, and investing in digital project delivery technologies.
about_future.p2: We remain committed to our core values: engineering excellence, operational safety, client partnership, and long-term value creation for every stakeholder we work with.

about_team_section.title: The Team Behind INFRA
about_team_section.p1: INFRA Construction employs over 200 qualified professionals — engineers, planners, supervisors, and skilled crews — who bring technical expertise and operational experience to every project.
about_team_section.p2: Our people are our greatest asset. We invest in continuous training, professional development, and a safety-first culture that attracts and retains the best talent across the region.

news_2.title: A Strategic Step Toward Kuwait: INFRA Explores Market Expansion Opportunities
news_2.excerpt: As part of its ongoing strategy to expand its footprint in development and infrastructure projects across Africa, Infra Construction has participated in the prequalification process for the construction of two vocational training centers in two cities in Somaliland, a project funded by the German Development Bank (KfW).
news_2.author: INFRA Communications
news_2.p1: As part of its ongoing strategy to expand its footprint in development and infrastructure projects across Africa, Infra Construction has participated in the prequalification process for the construction of two vocational training centers in two cities in Somaliland, a project funded by the German Development Bank (KfW).
news_2.p2: The company has successfully advanced to the shortlist alongside four other international firms and is currently proceeding through the technical evaluation and post-qualification stages, reflecting the strength of its expertise and its ability to compete in large-scale development projects.
news_2.p3: This achievement highlights the growing confidence in Infra Construction's capabilities as a reliable partner in delivering sustainable projects that support development and create a meaningful impact in the communities they serve.
news_2.h1: Strategic meeting held with Go Green in Kuwait
news_2.h2: Exploring market entry and expansion opportunities
news_2.h3: Kuwait identified as key target market for regional growth
news_2.h4: Building foundations for potential project delivery in Kuwait

news_3.title: As part of its commitment to advancing smart solutions and embracing cutting-edge technologies in the construction sector
news_3.excerpt: As part of its commitment to advancing smart solutions and embracing cutting-edge technologies in the construction sector, Infra Construction participated, in collaboration with Tamdeed, in a tender launched by the Municipality of Abu Dhabi for the implementation of an advanced AI-powered tower crane monitoring system.
news_3.author: INFRA Projects Team
news_3.p1: As part of its commitment to advancing smart solutions and embracing cutting-edge technologies in the construction sector, Infra Construction participated, in collaboration with Tamdeed, in a tender launched by the Municipality of Abu Dhabi for the implementation of an advanced AI-powered tower crane monitoring system.
news_3.p2: The project aims to enhance safety standards and operational efficiency across construction sites through intelligent monitoring solutions capable of real-time analysis and continuous supervision, supporting the ongoing digital transformation and smart city initiatives shaping the future of infrastructure and construction.
news_3.p3: This initiative reflects Infra Construction's continued focus on delivering innovative engineering solutions that contribute to safer, more efficient, and technologically advanced built environments.
news_3.h1: Two residential plots completed in Nad Al Sheba, Dubai
news_3.h2: Each plot features two standalone villas
news_3.h3: Designed for exceptional privacy and family living

news_4.title: Infra Construction has successfully completed and delivered two residential plots in Nad Al Sheba, Dubai
news_4.excerpt: Infra Construction has successfully completed and delivered two residential plots in Nad Al Sheba, Dubai, each featuring two standalone villas thoughtfully designed to offer exceptional privacy and a comfortable family living experience.
news_4.author: INFRA Communications
news_4.p1: Infra Construction has successfully completed and delivered two residential plots in Nad Al Sheba, Dubai, each featuring two standalone villas thoughtfully designed to offer exceptional privacy and a comfortable family living experience.
news_4.p2: The project was executed in line with the latest engineering standards, utilizing high-quality materials and meticulous attention to both interior and exterior finishing details. Every aspect reflects our commitment to delivering fully integrated residential developments that meet client expectations and align with modern lifestyle needs.
news_4.p3: At Infra Construction, consistent delivery at this level isn’t an exception — it’s our standard.
news_4.h2: Recognising Jordan's journey of growth and stability
news_4.h3: Reaffirming INFRA's commitment to its regional partnerships
news_4.h4: Congratulations extended to the Hashemite Kingdom

news_5.title: As part of its continuous efforts to explore expansion opportunities in the Kuwaiti market
news_5.excerpt: As part of its continuous efforts to explore expansion opportunities in the Kuwaiti market, Infra Construction held an important meeting with Go Green, attended by Sheikha Al Arefj, to discuss prospects for cooperation and joint investment. 🇰🇼🤝
news_5.author: INFRA Communications
news_5.p1: As part of its continuous efforts to explore expansion opportunities in the Kuwaiti market, Infra Construction held an important meeting with Go Green, attended by Sheikha Al Arefj, to discuss prospects for cooperation and joint investment. 🇰🇼🤝
news_5.p2: The meeting featured in-depth discussions on potential growth opportunities within Kuwait, where several strategic scenarios were reviewed to strengthen the company’s presence in the market. These included studying the possibility of opening a regional office in Kuwait, as well as exploring acquisition opportunities with local companies to support long-term growth and expansion plans.
news_5.p3: This step reflects Infra Construction’s strong commitment to expanding its presence in promising markets and strengthening relationships with partners and clients through well-planned expansion strategies based on effective partnerships and sustainable investment.
news_5.h1: Expanding into railway and intelligent transportation systems
news_5.h2: Strategic meeting held with leading Korean company
news_5.h3: Targeting growing rail infrastructure market in the region

news_6.title: In a step that reflects our strategic direction toward expanding regional partnerships.
news_6.excerpt: In a step that reflects our strategic direction toward expanding regional partnerships, Infra Construction has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with Al Deera Contracting Company on March 12, 2026, in the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan.
news_6.author: INFRA Communications
news_6.p1: In a step that reflects our strategic direction toward expanding regional partnerships, Infra Construction has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with Al Deera Contracting Company on March 12, 2026, in the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan.
news_6.p2: This partnership is driven by the complementarity of expertise between both parties. Al Deera brings a strong track record in water supply and wastewater networks, along with extensive experience in building and road construction, which strengthens our joint capability to deliver fully integrated projects with high efficiency.
news_6.p3: We view this agreement as the beginning of a fruitful collaboration that will open new opportunities in the Jordanian market and enhance our ability to provide engineering and execution solutions that meet the demands of vital projects in line with the highest standards.

news_7.title: We are pleased to announce the start of construction works for the Al Wathba Slaughterhouse Cold Storage Expansion Project in Abu Dhabi
news_7.excerpt: We are pleased to announce the start of construction works for the Al Wathba Slaughterhouse Cold Storage Expansion Project in Abu Dhabi, delivered by Infra Construction in partnership with STBM for the Abu Dhabi Municipality.
news_7.author: INFRA Communications
news_7.p1:
We are pleased to announce the start of construction works for the Al Wathba Slaughterhouse Cold Storage Expansion Project in Abu Dhabi, delivered by Infra Construction in partnership with STBM for the Abu Dhabi Municipality.
The project marks another step toward enhancing service facilities and strengthening infrastructure that supports the food security ecosystem in the Emirate of Abu Dhabi.
news_7.p2:
Our technical teams have officially commenced on-site activities, including site preparation, safety setup, excavation, and initial groundwork, paving the way for the next phases of construction in line with the approved project schedule.
The scope of the project includes the construction of new steel structure buildings, featuring the following: Expansion of the existing meat cold storage facility. Expansion of the ticketing area and public hall. Development of a new dedicated meat cooling zone.
news_7.p3: These upgrades form part of an integrated development plan aimed at improving operational efficiency and enhancing the overall functionality of the facility.
news_7.p4:
The project is scheduled to be completed within six months, with execution carried out according to the highest engineering and construction standards to ensure quality, reliability, and operational performance.
At Infra Construction, we remain committed to contributing to the development of vital infrastructure projects in Abu Dhabi and delivering construction solutions that create long-term value and support sustainable development.
news_7.h2: Gradspan specialises in construction and steel works in the UAE
news_7.h4: Part of INFRA's broader strategic partner network development

careers_why.title: Build Your Career With Us
careers_why.p1: INFRA Construction offers a dynamic, challenging, and rewarding work environment for engineers, planners, project managers, and construction professionals. Our teams work on landmark infrastructure projects across the Middle East, Africa, and beyond — gaining experience that spans sectors, borders, and technical disciplines.
careers_why.p2: We are committed to developing our people. Whether you are a recent graduate or an experienced professional, INFRA provides the projects, the mentorship, and the professional growth opportunities that enable you to reach your full potential.

careers_benefit_1.title: Landmark Projects
careers_benefit_1.body: Work on significant infrastructure projects that shape communities and regions across the Middle East and Africa.

careers_benefit_2.title: Professional Growth
careers_benefit_2.body: Structured career development, technical training, and mentorship programmes for all levels.

careers_benefit_3.title: International Exposure
careers_benefit_3.body: Opportunities to work across multiple countries and gain broad regional and international experience.

careers_benefit_4.title: Collaborative Culture
careers_benefit_4.body: Supportive team environment where expertise is shared and contributions are valued at every level.

careers_benefit_5.title: Safety First
careers_benefit_5.body: A genuine commitment to health, safety, and wellbeing across all project sites and office environments.

careers_benefit_6.title: Competitive Package
careers_benefit_6.body: Competitive salaries, benefits, and recognition for high-performing team members.

careers_empower.title: We Empower Our People
careers_empower.p1: At INFRA Construction, we believe that the quality of our projects is a direct reflection of the quality of our people. We recruit talented individuals and invest in their growth through structured training, challenging project assignments, and a culture of continuous improvement.
careers_empower.p2: Our technical teams are supported by experienced leadership, modern tools, and a collaborative work environment that rewards initiative, creativity, and professional excellence.

home_whoweare.paragraph1: Infra Construction is a contracting company that has carried out numerous and various projects since its establishment in 1990. Every task is executed through hard work, dedication, and optimal management of resources.
home_whoweare.paragraph2: We provide professional services in contracting — especially in the infrastructure field — executing according to international codes and project specifications, with offices across the UAE, Egypt, Yemen, Jordan, and Canada.
